The '''Medal of Guile''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] medal awarded for successfully completing twelve tours of duty. The specific occasion for awarding it was the [[Prelude to Endor|successful setting up]] of [[Battle of Endor/Legends|the trap]] for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]], who were unaware of the [[Death Star II/Legends|Second Death Star's]] true operational status.

==Design==
The ribbon possessed red and yellow stripes, and was three pronged. The medal itself was two pronged and was gold with silver linings, with the Imperial Crest being emblazoned on the front in blue.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
